ddls:
CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "author_name" TEXT /* Full name of the author */,
  "thesis_count" INTEGER /* Number of theses submitted by the author */,
  "last_employer" TEXT /* Name of the author's last employer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the author */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the author */,
  "address" TEXT /* Current address of the author */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the author is associated with */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the author record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theses" (
  "thesis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each thesis */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the thesis */,
  "thesis_year" INTEGER /* Year the thesis was submitted */,
  "thesis_title" TEXT /* Title of the thesis */,
  "abstract" TEXT /* Abstract of the thesis */,
  "file_size" INTEGER /* Size of the thesis document in bytes */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the thesis document */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the thesis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the thesis record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the thesis record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("thesis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theses_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "employment_history" (
  "employment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each employment record */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author */,
  "employer" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position held at the employer */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of employment */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of employment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the employment record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the employment record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("employment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_employment_history_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control record */,
  "user_id" TEXT /* Reference to the user */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that the user has access to */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Type of permissions (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access control record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the access control record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id")
)
